headline: DoorDash, Observe.AI, and AWS Partner to Scale Customer-Centric AI Across 19,000 Agents
summary: Observe.AI today shared the impact of its collaboration with DoorDash and Amazon Web Services (AWS), which has transformed DoorDash's customer support operations through nearly 100% automated interaction evaluations across 19,000 agents—driving real-time hotspot detection, deeper sentiment visibility, and stronger quality consistency at scale.

content.title: DoorDash, Observe.AI, and AWS Partner to Scale Customer-Centric AI Across 19,000 Agents
content.summary: Observe.AI today shared the impact of its collaboration with DoorDash and Amazon Web Services (AWS), which has transformed DoorDash's customer support operations through nearly 100% automated interaction evaluations across 19,000 agents—driving real-time hotspot detection, deeper sentiment visibility, and stronger quality consistency at scale.

thumbnail.caption: Doordash evaluates nearly 100% of customer interactions with Observe.AI to deliver a better customer experience

headline: Does DoorDash’s Hungry Howie’s White-Label Deal Reshape Its Platform Narrative For DASH?
summary: In July 2026, Hungry Howie's announced it partnered with DoorDash to rebuild its website and mobile app, overhaul loyalty, and consolidate its DoorDash-powered digital ordering and delivery infrastructure across all locations by the second quarter of 2027. The deal highlights DoorDash’s role not just as a marketplace, but as a white-label commerce and loyalty platform underpinning restaurant-owned digital channels at scale. Next, we’ll examine how DoorDash’s role in powering Hungry Howie’s...
